title: Figma's woes compound with Claude Design
content: Figma is facing additional challenges following its recent integration with Claude Design, sparking discussion and concern among users. The combination of Figma’s existing issues and the added complexity of Claude Design’s implementation has prompted criticism and debate in the developer community, particularly on Hacker News. The situation raises questions about the effectiveness and stability of the joint solution.

title: Vercel 确认遭入侵：第三方 AI 工具成突破口，黑客索要 200 万美元赎金
content: Vercel confirmed a security breach that began when attackers used a third‑party AI tool, Context.ai, to gain initial access via a compromised Google Workspace OAuth app. The breach exploited a “non‑sensitive” environment variable policy, allowing attackers to elevate privileges and access internal systems. A hacker claiming to be from “ShinyHunters” offered stolen data on the dark web and demanded $2 million in ransom. Vercel’s core services remain secure; the company is investigating and advising users to review and protect their environment variables.

title: pi-hole/pi-hole
content: Pi‑hole is a network‑wide ad‑blocking solution written in shell script, praised for reducing unwanted online content. It operates by filtering DNS queries, effectively blocking ads and trackers before they reach devices. The project garners strong community support, with over 56,000 stars and 3,000 forks, indicating active development and widespread use.

title: 谋生型工作和兴趣型工作
content: The article reflects on how a person’s early focus—either on survival (谋生型工作) or on interest (兴趣型工作)—shapes their career trajectory. It argues that a high starting point is not measured by wealth but by having the security to pursue interests early. Those who grow up without safety concerns learn to defend themselves rather than explore, whereas those with security can engage in passion‑driven work that fuels long‑term growth. The author emphasizes that true success stems from early alignment of interest and career, not just financial gain.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 李药师2003

title: 部署本地模型 token 输出万能公式
content: This note explains that when deploying a 31 B GEMMA model in BF16 on a GPU with 273 GB/s memory bandwidth, each token takes about 227 ms, yielding a theoretical 4.4 tokens/s. Realistic performance is ~3 tokens/s, max 2.5. Key factors: the model must fit in GPU memory and the memory bandwidth must be sufficient; otherwise performance drops. Mac GPUs behave differently, allowing slower but usable rates (~20 tokens/s). Local deployment is mainly for experimentation; expect lower speed than online models, especially for complex code generation. Proper cooling is essential.
eventKey: 部署本地模型-token-输出万能公式
normalizedTitle: 部署本地模型 token 输出万能公式

title: Anthropic暴力封杀，60人Claude一夜断供，网友：千万别豪赌一个AI
content: In 2026, financial‑tech firm Belo lost all 60+ Claude AI accounts overnight, halting coding, analysis, and customer support. Anthropic cited “policy violations” but offered no detail, only a Google form for appeal. Belo’s CTO, Pato Molina, publicly criticized the abrupt shutdown, which was later reversed after a delayed response. The event, part of a broader pattern of sudden Claude outages, highlighted the risk of over‑reliance on a single AI provider and the need for backup systems.
